display.purpose: Hero and page-level statements; ceiling is --text-6xl (3.875rem).

body.purpose: Default UI text — compact 0.875rem; 0.8125rem in tables and controls.

label.purpose: Uppercase tracked mono labels — eyebrows (//-prefixed), column headers, status labels.

shadows.name: shadow-1
shadows.purpose: Faintest rest lift; most cards use a hairline and no shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default mechanical easing — no bounce, no overshoot.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Signal Green primary action — one per view.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: var(--control-h, 32px); padding: 0 14px; background: var(--accent); color: var(--accent-fg); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 5px); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.005em; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--dur-fast, 90ms) var(--ease-standard); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: var(--accent-active); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outlined neutral action on the card surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: var(--control-h, 32px); padding: 0 14px; background: var(--bg-1); color: var(--fg-1); border: 1px solid var(--border-3); border-radius: var(--radius-md, 5px); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--dur-fast, 90ms) var(--ease-standard), border-color var(--dur-fast, 90ms); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: var(--bg-2); border-color: var(--fg-4); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: var(--bg-3); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Quiet tertiary action; fills on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 7px; height: var(--control-h, 32px); padding: 0 14px; background: transparent; color: var(--fg-2); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: var(--radius-md, 5px); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background var(--dur-fast, 90ms) var(--ease-standard), color var(--dur-fast, 90ms); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--bg-2); color: var(--fg-1); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: var(--bg-3); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Labeled field with accent focus ring and mono suffix slot.
components.html:
ms
Request timeout per attempt.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; max-width: 260px; font-family: var(--font-sans); } .ds-field-label { font-size: var(--text-xs, 0.75rem); font-weight: 500; color: var(--fg-2); } .ds-field-box { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; height: var(--control-h, 32px); padding: 0 10px; background: var(--bg-1); border: 1px solid var(--border-3); border-radius: var(--radius-md, 5px); transition: border-color var(--dur-fast, 90ms), box-shadow var(--dur-fast, 90ms); } .ds-field-box:focus-within { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); } .ds-field-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border: none; outline: none; background: transparent; color: var(--fg-1); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); padding: 0; } .ds-field-suffix { color: var(--fg-3); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-xs, 0.75rem); } .ds-field-hint { font-size: var(--text-xs, 0.75rem); color: var(--fg-3); }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Subtle tinted badge with status dot — status is a dot plus a word, never a filled pill.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; height: 20px; padding: 0 8px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 3px); font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-2xs, 0.6875rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-badge-success { background: var(--success-subtle); color: var(--success-subtle-fg); } .ds-badge-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 999px; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Hairline-bordered surface, no shadow at rest; mono eyebrow + mono metric.
components.html:
// LATENCY P99
142ms
last 15 min · us-east-1
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; width: 220px; padding: var(--card-pad, 20px); background: var(--bg-1); border: 1px solid var(--border-1); border-radius: var(--radius-lg, 8px); font-family: var(--font-sans); } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-2xs, 0.6875rem); font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--fg-3); } .ds-card-value { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: var(--text-2xl, 1.5rem); font-weight: 600; color: var(--fg-1); line-height: 1.15; } .ds-card-unit { font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); font-weight: 500; color: var(--fg-3); margin-left: 3px; } .ds-card-meta { font-size: var(--text-xs, 0.75rem); color: var(--fg-3); }

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Underline tabs — accent underline marks the active tab.
components.css: .ds-tabs { display: flex; gap: 4px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-1); font-family: var(--font-sans); } .ds-tab { position: relative; height: 34px; padding: 0 12px; background: transparent; border: none; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; margin-bottom: -1px; color: var(--fg-3); font-family: var(--font-sans); font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: color var(--dur-fast, 90ms) var(--ease-standard); } .ds-tab:hover { color: var(--fg-1); } .ds-tab:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: var(--focus-ring); border-radius: var(--radius-sm, 3px); } .ds-tab-active { color: var(--fg-1); border-bottom-color: var(--accent); }

components.name: Dotted-Leader Status Line
components.description: Signature grammar: label, dotted leader, mono value.
components.css: .ds-leader { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 8px; width: 240px; font-size: var(--text-sm, 0.8125rem); font-family: var(--font-sans); color: var(--fg-2); } .ds-leader-dots { flex: 1; border-bottom: 1px dotted var(--border-2); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-leader-value { font-family: var(--font-mono); color: var(--fg-1); }

narrative.overview: Futurist reads like a well-machined cockpit gauge: dense, calibrated, and quiet until something matters. Cool, near-zero-chroma grey surfaces form the panel; hairlines etch the structure; numbers are first-class citizens set in mono with their units; and one Signal Green light tells you what is alive, selected, or primary. Information density is the point — but every screen keeps a single primary focus, and every value earns its place. The system explicitly rejects the generic 2026 AI dev-tool landing page (pill version badge, fake terminal hero, dark stats strip, 3-tier pricing template) and heavy legacy enterprise chrome (beveled toolbars-everywhere density without hierarchy).
keyCharacteristics: Data-dense, compact scale — base UI text 0.875rem (14px), 32px controls, 4px grid
One accent: Signal Green, spent on primary actions, selection, and live state only
Numbers, labels, and eyebrows in IBM Plex Mono; prose and UI in Atkinson Hyperlegible Next
Hairline-drawn structure; shadows reserved for true overlays
Quick mechanical motion (90–240ms), no bounce, no choreography
Light + dark via [data-theme], AA-verified in both

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: Signal Green appears on ≤10% of any screen: primary action, current selection, live state. If green is decorating, it is lying — status uses the semantic palette, everything else stays grey.

rules.name: The Token Contract Rule
rules.body: Tokens are the contract: kits and components consume tokens; hardcoded color values are drift, not convenience. If a value isn't a var(--…), it's a bug (the deliberately pinned-dark panels — terminal/readout blocks and the marketing hero's blueprint panel — are the sole exception).

rules.name: The Mono Numbers Rule
rules.body: Numeric values are always set in mono with their units (142ms, 99.98%, 4.2k). A proportional-face metric is a typo.

rules.name: The Sentence Case Rule
rules.body: All copy is sentence case — buttons, headings, labels. The only uppercase in the system is the tracked mono eyebrow. No emoji, no exclamation-point marketing.

rules.name: The Hairline-First Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest and separated by hairlines, not shadows or zebra fills. A shadow is a statement that something floats — menus, popovers, dialogs — and nothing else earns one.

dos: Do consume tokens for every color, size, radius, and duration — tokens are the contract; hardcoded values are drift, not convenience.
Do set every number in IBM Plex Mono with its unit (142ms, 99.98%), right-aligned in tables.
Do verify ≥4.5:1 contrast for normal text in both themes before shipping; --fg-3 is the muted-text floor, --fg-4 is disabled-only.
Do keep Signal Green ≤10% of any screen: primary action, selection, live state.
Do ship all states — default, hover, focus-visible (3px --accent-ring), active, disabled, loading — and full keyboard operation on every interactive component.
Do use the //-prefixed uppercase mono eyebrow and dotted-leader status lines as the signature grammar — deliberately, not on every section.
Do support [data-theme="dark"] on everything; if you used tokens, it's already done.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion — the duration tokens collapse globally; don't hardcode durations that escape them.
donts: Don't build the generic 2026 AI dev-tool landing page: pill version badge + fake terminal hero + dark stats strip + 3-tier pricing template.
Don't recreate heavy legacy enterprise chrome: beveled toolbars-everywhere density without hierarchy (old Jira/SAP energy).
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left > 1px as a colored accent) on cards, callouts, or alerts — use full hairlines, background tints, or leading dots instead.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism-as-default, or zebra-striped tables.
Don't use emoji, exclamation-point marketing, or Title Case UI copy.
Don't put gray text on colored backgrounds, or promote --fg-4 to readable text.
Don't animate with bounce, overshoot, or orchestrated page-load choreography — motion is 90–240ms, mechanical, state-conveying only.
Don't invent affordances for standard tasks: standard controls, standard modals, standard scrollbars. Familiarity is the trust currency in product surfaces.
Don't use display sizes above --text-6xl (3.875rem) or letter-spacing tighter than -0.02em.
